hero.name: Ruy Vieira
hero.tagline: I build open-source tools across AI, type-safe systems, and backend infrastructure.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A bit about who I am and what I do.
about.p1: I'm a software engineer who loves shipping open-source. My work spans AI and retrieval-augmented generation, type-safe TypeScript frameworks, and backend systems in Go and Python.
about.p2: I care about developer experience, clean architecture, and tools that make hard problems feel simple. When I find a recurring pain point, I tend to turn it into a library.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Open-source work I'm proud of. Stars and languages are pulled live from GitHub.
